rationale: This archetype is a documentary-style curiosity hook (cross-section reveal of landmark bunkers) with a dark, earthy palette (navy/orange/forest green) that clashes hard with Roof Rails' bright pastel cyan minimalism — there's no character, no runner energy, and no rooftop/pole imagery to anchor the game. Mechanically the cross-section pan has zero connection to the run-collect-slide loop, and while the broad curiosity audience overlaps slightly with hypercasual's wide net, the content vibe skews older/edutainment rather than snackable casual play. Recommend skipping this archetype for Roof Rails; if curiosity hooks are desired, build a bespoke "what's under the rooftop?" reveal that actually showcases the pole-balancing mechanic.
